name: Doshin @Ignister
name_jp: ドシン<ruby lang="jp"><rb>＠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>イグニスター
desc: If you control an "@Ignister" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 Cyberse Link Monster in your GY; return it to the Extra Deck, and if you do, add 1 "A.I. Love Fusion" from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Doshin @Ignister" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control an "@Ignister" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 Cyberse Link Monster in your GY; return it to the Extra Deck, and if you do, add 1 "A.I. Love Fusion" from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Doshin @Ignister" once per turn.
eff: If you control an "@Ignister" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 Cyberse Link Monster in your GY; return it to the Extra Deck, and if you do, add 1 "A.I. Love Fusion" from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Doshin @Ignister" once per turn.

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Extra Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
